creator: schonefeld@ids-mannheim.de
text:
Hi,

I've got the same issue here with two VMs (i386/PV and amd64/HVM). VMs
are running on XenServer 6.0.2. I've been RELENG_9 sources as of
2012-03-13 23:49 UTC.

Console messages do not contain anything about "xbd". I see e.g.
"xenpci" and "xenstore", "xn", "xenbusb_back", "xctrl", "xen and "xn"
successfully attaching, but no sign of any "xbd". However "cd0" seems
also to attach successfully.

I've attached a screenshot from the last lines of the console-output
(Sorry, XenCenter doesn't want to let cut'n'paste the text).

Best,
 Oliver
-- 
Oliver Schonefeld
Institut für Deutsche Sprache, Zentrale Forschung
